revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[千葉県]][[神崎町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:こうさきまち}} [[Category:千葉県の建築物 (市町村別)]] [[Category:神崎町|けんちくふつ]] {{座標一覧}}」

Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

revision.text:

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[千葉県]][[神崎町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:こうさきまち}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|こうさきまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:神崎町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:神崎町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:神崎町の建築物|version=92894861}}
[[ja:Category:神崎町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kōzaki Shrine]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Buildings in Chiba prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kōzaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{デフォルトソート:こうさきまち}} {{座標一覧}} {{citation needed|こうさきまち}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:神崎町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:神崎町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:神崎町の建築物|version=92894861}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:神崎町の建築物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kōzaki Shrine]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Buildings in Chiba prefecture by municipality]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Kōzaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Architecture_of_K%C5%8Dzaki_Town here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
